rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is the “rabbit hole effect” in sequential media choice driven by category accessibility/immersion, while the cited paper focuses on mobile-vs-nonmobile review cues, inferred effort, and credibility in WOM contexts—mechanistically and empirically a different problem space. The only linkage provided is a single DOI-level reference match with no in-text citation context or evidence of methodological/theoretical dependence. Based on the provided evidence, this looks most like a peripheral background mention rather than a substantive use.
